[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000100001 2
2 001000101 3
3 101000010 3
4 010110010 4
5 010010100 3
6 001100100 3
7 010010011 4

70 07 000000100 1
